intro.title: Diestra Group Gastronomy
intro.body: Follow all the World Cup action from the best culinary spots in our properties. Explore dishes and official promotions:

detalle.disclaimer: Times subject to FIFA confirmation. Hotel suggestion is based on the match venue.

contacto.title: Get the best World Cup promos
contacto.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll email you when new promotions launch at Diestra hotels during the FIFA World Cup 2026.

newsletter.title: Subscribe to our promos
newsletter.subtitle: Get the best 2026 World Cup dining promotions delivered to your inbox.
newsletter.consentimiento: I agree to receive communications from Grupo Diestra and understand my data will be handled under the privacy policy.

success.title: Subscription confirmed!
success.body: We'll send the next promotions to your inbox.

errors.faltantes: Please enter your name and email.
errors.consentimiento: We need your consent to send you communications.

buscar.placeholder: Search hotel, promo, team or venue…
buscar.empty: Type something to find hotels, promotions, matches or news.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The content you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
